title: SAFRI 600ml Over Night Oats Container Reusable Yogurt Cups 100% BPA Free Breakfast On The Go Cereal Yogurt Pot with Lids and Spoon (White & Teal Blue Cup)
features: YOGURT CUP WITH LID--- Plastic muesli pot has two containers, the transparent top pot for for granola, cereal or fruit, is screws into the bottom part where you can store yogurt or fruit trifle. Ideal for sweet popcorns, sweet cookies, Jellies, fruit trifle, salad, oat, blueberries, granola, muesli, fruit custurd, sweet meals, snack, crunch, strawberries with milk or yogurt.
DURABLE DESIGN WITH SPOON-- These yogurt cups with lids and spoons. A plastic spoon is included for convenient use, and it can be easily clipped on the cover for easy storage.

LEAK-PROOF & SAFE CLEAR JARS FOR CUSTOMIZING--- The oatmeal pots are clear, allowing food to be visually appealing and motivating you to get creative with different food combinations. The pots are also great for making overnight meals.
REUSEABLE DURABLE BPA-FREE PLASTIC --- Made of BPA-free food grade plastic. Easy to clean and dishwasher safe.
PRODUCT DIMENSION: 19.99 x 19 x 10.59 cm; 380 Grams item weight: 380g. Material Plastic
